understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to finish the current level (BP35) and then continue until the game is won. In each level, the player must reach the goal gem tile marked `+` while avoiding spike tiles; landing on a spike ends the run. Each level provides 2 attempts with 50 turns per attempt, and levels should be completed efficiently.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is continuous in the direction of gravity (down) until hitting a solid tile or the ground, using MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT to change horizontal position while falling. CLICK removes a clickable tile at the specified position, and if the player is on top of that tile when it is removed, gravity pulls them down. Hazards are spikes that kill on contact. UNDO presumably reverses the last action, though not used in this episode. The player has limited steps per attempt and must plan moves to navigate to the goal without dying.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to finish the current level (BP35) and then continue until the game is won. In each level, the player must reach the goal gem tile marked `+` while avoiding spike tiles; landing on a spike ends the run. Each level provides 2 attempts with 50 turns per attempt, and levels should be completed efficiently.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is continuous in the direction of gravity (down) until hitting a solid tile or the ground, using MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT to change horizontal position while falling. CLICK removes a clickable tile at the specified position, and if the player is on top of that tile when it is removed, gravity pulls them down. Hazards are spikes that kill on contact. UNDO presumably reverses the last action, though not used in this episode. The player has limited steps per attempt and must plan moves to navigate to the goal without dying.
